candidates.row_label: Depreciation, amortization and impairment of property, plant and equipment,
candidates.why: Only explicit operating D&A-like row above the financial section. However, it is a combined company-level depreciation/amortization/impairment line and is not identified as COGS-specific or as a component outside the selected COGS row 'Raw materials and consumables'. Using it for COGS_DA would risk misallocating SG&A/R&D/non-COGS amounts and double counting.

variables.notes: The only visible operating D&A row is an undifferentiated total that also includes impairment and cannot be cleanly attributed to COGS relative to the selected COGS bucket. Conservative output is empty to avoid double counting/misattribution.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation, amortization and impairment of property, plant and equipment,
candidates.why: Only explicit operating D&A-like row above the financial section. It sits separately from 'Other External Expenses' and 'Personnel costs', so it may be outside the selected XSGA component rows. But it is a combined total line that likely spans multiple functions and also includes impairment, with no SG&A-only breakdown.

variables.notes: Because the visible row is a broad operating D&A/impairment total and XRD is empty, there is insufficient evidence to assign it specifically to XSGA without risking overstatement or cross-bucket contamination. Conservative output is empty.
